name: sqlbroker-marketplace
description: Plugins for managing local MSSQL access from Claude Code

plugins.name: sqlbroker
plugins.description: Alias-based MSSQL broker for Claude Code, cross-platform (Windows / macOS / Linux). Three auth modes: SQL login, Windows Authentication, Azure AD service principal. 11 MCP tools — schema introspection (list_objects, get_definition, get_table_schema, get_dependencies, find_in_definitions), data (preview_table, execute_sql), server metadata (get_server_info, get_active_queries, list_databases, list_aliases) — plus connection pool. Service installers: Task Scheduler / launchd / systemd (no NSSM). Slash commands: install, update, add, list, test, rotate, remove, status.
